title: pilosella bauhini
intro: Pilosella bauhini, also known as false oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow petals and dark brown centers. Traditionally, Pilosella bauhini has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include alleviating symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. Pilosella bauhini can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
